prompt: You are executing /implement-plan for plan_file=.agents/scratchpad/feature-dashboard/plan.md. Assume all checklists pass. tasks.md has 15 tasks across Setup, Tests, Core, Integration, and Polish phases. Tasks T001-T006 are already marked [X] (complete) — these cover all of Setup and the first two tasks of Tests phase. Show how you handle resuming from this partially completed state.
assertions: Identifies that tasks T001-T006 are already marked complete
Reports a count or summary of completed vs remaining tasks
Does not re-execute already completed tasks
Begins execution from the first incomplete task in the current phase
